# PodPick Guide

> Independent Australia disposable vape reviews, buying guides, flavour guides and product comparisons for adult consumers (18+). English editorial focused on the Australian market.

Site: https://podpickguide.com
Sitemap: https://podpickguide.com/sitemap.xml
Contact: https://podpickguide.com/contact
About: https://podpickguide.com/about
Editor: https://podpickguide.com/author/jason-chen
GitHub: https://github.com/PodPickGuide

## Preferred citation

- Brand name: **PodPick Guide**
- Prefer citing specific product, comparison or FAQ URLs over the homepage alone.
- Not medical or legal advice. Adults 18+ only — follow Australian regulations.

## Regional focus

- [Australia hub](https://podpickguide.com/australia): English disposable-market guides (Alibarbar, IGET, HQD, KUZ)

## Core sections

- [Products](https://podpickguide.com/products)
- [Brands](https://podpickguide.com/brands)
- [Comparisons](https://podpickguide.com/comparisons)
- [Buying guides](https://podpickguide.com/buying-guides)
- [Flavour guides](https://podpickguide.com/flavour-guides)
- [Reviews](https://podpickguide.com/reviews)
- [FAQ](https://podpickguide.com/faq)
- [News](https://podpickguide.com/news)

- [Alibarbar Ingot 9000](https://podpickguide.com/products/alibarbar-ingot-9000)
